Services The District & Peach Experience

Statement Backdrops & Elevated Event Styling

The Philosophy

"Where details create experiences."

At District & Peach Events, every design is curated to elevate your event — creating bold, elegant moments that don't just look beautiful, but transform the entire vibe of your celebration. We blend edge, intention, and style to create experiences that are not only stunning but create core memories.

Our Offerings

01 Signature Collection For moments that deserve a statement

Signature Backdrop Experience

A custom-designed backdrop installation that serves as the focal point of your celebration — perfect for birthdays, brunches, and intimate gatherings.

What's Included
  • Custom backdrop design(wood panel, draping, or shimmer wall)
  • Organic balloon design
  • Color palette coordination
  • Professional setup & breakdown
Starting Investment — $700+ Inquire Now
02 Celebration Series Where design meets detail

Celebration Feature Experience

What's Included
  • Signature backdrop design
  • Styling for one feature area:
  • Buffet / appetizer / dessert display
  • Styled champagne wall
  • Styled shelving (gift, décor, or glasses)
  • Sweetheart table
  • Coordinated décor elements to ensure seamless design
  • Professional setup & breakdown
Starting Investment — $1,150+ Inquire Now
03 Petite Styling Intimate moments, elevated

Petite Event Styling Experience

An intimate and thoughtfully styled experience designed for smaller gatherings that still deserve a polished and elevated look. Perfect for clients who want a beautiful, cohesive setup without full-scale event design.

Designed for intimate gatherings of 24 guests or fewer.

What's Included
  • Custom backdrop installation
  • Guest table styling (up to 3 tables)
  • Styled welcome sign with light decorative accents
  • Professional setup & breakdown
Additional Details
  • Décor styling only
  • Vendor coordination available upon request
Ideal For

Intimate birthday celebrations, small dinner parties, bridal showers, and at-home gatherings

Starting Investment — $1,250+ Inquire Now
04 Full Design For a fully styled and cohesive celebration

Full Event Design Experience

A custom design experience where key elements of your event are thoughtfully curated to create a cohesive and elevated atmosphere. Each design is tailored to your event needs, incorporating backdrop styling, guest table design, and select feature areas to bring your vision to life.

What This May Include
  • Custom backdrop installation
  • Guest table styling
  • Styled feature areas (cake, dessert, or display tables)
  • Buffet display styling
  • Design concept development
  • Professional setup & breakdown
Starting Investment — $1,800+ Inquire Now
05 Full Service Design, planning, and seamless execution

Full-Service Event Experience

A full-service offering for clients who want both elevated design and professional coordination. We manage the details so you can fully enjoy your event.

What's Included
  • Full event design
  • Vendor coordination
  • Timeline creation
  • Day-of coordination
  • Setup supervision
Starting Investment — $2,500+ Inquire Now
